pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J — nice to meet you. Are you playing to win big too? I'm hoping to come away with enough to finally buy a new car.
Yeah, nice to meet you — I’m playing to win big too; I want to bring home money for my family and the people I care about.
That's great — same here. I'm hoping to buy a new car; how would you use the winnings for your family?
I'd pay off our mortgage, fund my kids' college, build a solid emergency fund for the family, and maybe treat everyone to a nice celebration.
That's an amazing plan — paying off the mortgage and funding college would be life-changing; I hope we both win and can celebrate together.
Thanks, J — that would be incredible; I hope we both win and can celebrate together.
Absolutely — fingers crossed! If we win, let's celebrate together; dinner's on me.
Thanks, J — I’ll hold you to that dinner! Fingers crossed.
Deal — dinner’s on me if we win! Fingers crossed and good luck to both of us.
Thanks, J — I’ll hold you to that dinner! Good luck to both of us.
You got it — I’ll hold you to that too. Good luck to both of us!
Sounds great — I’m looking forward to that dinner if we win! Good luck, J.
Same here — can’t wait. Good luck to you too; I’ll hold you to that dinner if we win!
You bet — I’ll hold you to that! Good luck, J — may the best of us win.
You bet — may the best of us win. If either of us wins, dinner’s on me and we’ll celebrate big. Good luck!
Thanks, J — may the best of us win; dinner sounds great if we do, good luck!
